calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Judith Baer for (administrator) Robert Ayala.

Ms. Baer stated that the issue remaining is regarding the extarordinary fees on the tax liens, that the children of the decedent were not getting along, that they fought about everything, that the heir at law lived in El Salvador and had a CPA in San Francisco, that Ms. Baer communicated with the CPA and client to get this wrapped up, that she did not represent the heir at law but helped the CPA as they did not know probate law. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Continued To Nov-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1019 Russia Avenue, San Francisco Ca)
Off Calendar Jan-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Judith Baer for Petitioner.

The sale was confirmed at $685,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). An additional bond is not required/bond is waived.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
